notes: DR-Revise v1.1: All 4 blocking items from design_review round-1 addressed. M1: TRAK projection paradox resolved (random vs learned projection distinction in method-design Section 1.4). M2: 'independent' replaced with 'complementary' throughout; 2x2 interaction test is primary additivity assessment. M3: SNR formalization downgraded to motivating analysis with explicit caveats. M4: All 3 documents realigned to FM1/FM2 + DATE-LM direction. Additional: compute budget revised to ~210 GPU-hours; DDA downgraded to optional; gradient-norm baseline and Hessian quality ablation added.
